changeSet.author: jos
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO offer_translations (offer_id, locale, name, description, features) SELECT id, 'en', 'Solo', 'Perfect for experiencing your passion in total freedom.', '["Access to all events","1 guaranteed seat","Mobile e-ticket","Access to common areas"]' FROM offers WHERE name = 'Solo';

INSERT INTO offer_translations (offer_id, locale, name, description, features) SELECT id, 'de', 'Solo', 'Perfekt, um Ihre Leidenschaft in völliger Freiheit zu erleben.', '["Zugang zu allen Veranstaltungen","1 garantierter Sitzplatz","E-Ticket auf dem Handy","Zugang zu Gemeinschaftsbereichen"]' FROM offers WHERE name = 'Solo';

INSERT INTO offer_translations (offer_id, locale, name, description, features) SELECT id, 'es', 'Solo', 'Perfecto para vivir tu pasión con total libertad.', '["Acceso a todos los eventos","1 asiento garantizado","E-entrada en móvil","Acceso a zonas comunes"]' FROM offers WHERE name = 'Solo';

INSERT INTO offer_translations (offer_id, locale, name, description, features) SELECT id, 'en', 'Duo', 'Share unique moments for two, side by side.', '["Access to all events","2 guaranteed side-by-side seats","Mobile e-tickets","Access to common areas"]' FROM offers WHERE name = 'Duo';

INSERT INTO offer_translations (offer_id, locale, name, description, features) SELECT id, 'de', 'Duo', 'Teilen Sie einzigartige Momente zu zweit, Seite an Seite.', '["Zugang zu allen Veranstaltungen","2 garantierte nebeneinander liegende Sitzplätze","E-Tickets auf dem Handy","Zugang zu Gemeinschaftsbereichen"]' FROM offers WHERE name = 'Duo';

INSERT INTO offer_translations (offer_id, locale, name, description, features) SELECT id, 'es', 'Duo', 'Comparte momentos únicos de dos, lado a lado.', '["Acceso a todos los eventos","2 asientos garantizados juntos","E-entradas en móvil","Acceso a zonas comunes"]' FROM offers WHERE name = 'Duo';

INSERT INTO offer_translations (offer_id, locale, name, description, features) SELECT id, 'en', 'Family', 'Experience the Games as a family with grouped seats.', '["Access to all events","4 guaranteed grouped seats","Mobile e-tickets","Access to common areas","Paris 2024 souvenir bag included"]' FROM offers WHERE name = 'Famille';

INSERT INTO offer_translations (offer_id, locale, name, description, features) SELECT id, 'de', 'Familie', 'Erleben Sie die Spiele als Familie mit zusammenliegenden Plätzen.', '["Zugang zu allen Veranstaltungen","4 garantierte nebeneinander liegende Sitzplätze","E-Tickets auf dem Handy","Zugang zu Gemeinschaftsbereichen","Paris 2024 Souvenir-Tasche inklusive"]' FROM offers WHERE name = 'Famille';

INSERT INTO offer_translations (offer_id, locale, name, description, features) SELECT id, 'es', 'Familia', 'Vive los Juegos en familia con asientos agrupados.', '["Acceso a todos los eventos","4 asientos agrupados garantizados","E-entradas en móvil","Acceso a zonas comunes","Bolsa de recuerdo París 2024 incluida"]' FROM offers WHERE name = 'Famille';
